content:
**📢 Call for EN Side Story Translations!**

Hey Keepers! We have an exciting update and a new opportunity we'd love for you to be part of.

We're in a great place with most of the interface, skills, and main story translations — 85% of the EN text has already been covered! We're continuing to polish up the remaining issues, but overall things are looking really solid.

Where we need your help:
The biggest remaining chunk of MTL content is the Side Stories — think Psyche Deepdive, Dreamscape, Special Ops, and more. We'd love to invite volunteers to work alongside us on these!

Here's how it'll work:

At the start of each month, your language mod will collect from volunteers which stories they plan to work on, keeping track of who's doing what to avoid any overlap
At the end of each month, let your mod know when you're ready to submit your translated content to GitHub
On our end, Mia and I will cover any stories volunteers aren't picking up, and we're aiming for at least 1 old MTL story per 28-day patch alongside new version content.

Once you submit, we'll take care of the double-checking, proofreading, and lore confirmation with our writers before getting everything installed into the game.

Your contributions will be credited individually in every patch update, on top of the existing thank-you list. Every bit of help truly makes a difference, and none of this would be possible without you. 💙

If you're interested in jumping in, keep an eye out for your mod's check-in at the start of the month — or feel free to reach out if you have any questions!

Thank you so much, as always!
